name: OpenAI Direct Jury
description: Simplest production setup: one OpenAI model, shared credentials, multiple juror personas via system_prompt and weight.

jurors.name: Strict Evaluator
jurors.system_prompt: You are a meticulous quality reviewer. Score conservatively and cite specific issues.

jurors.name: User Advocate
jurors.system_prompt: You represent the end user. Prioritize clarity and whether the answer actually helps.

criteria.name: helpfulness
criteria.description: Does the response resolve the user's request?
